Our core services include:

 - Trial Feasibility & Site Engagement: Leveraging an access of over 150,000 investigators and sites, we ensure efficient country strategy, site identification, and feasibility assessments.

As a CTO, we make planning and running clinical trials easier with solutions that fit your needs.

• Superior Digestibility

With a global presence, Shandi Global partners with businesses to bridge the nutritional gap by improving food distribution networks , increasing awareness about healthy eating. and making nutritious food more accessible to underserved communities , along the way promoting  sustainability and nature based innovative products for a healthier future.

Spearheading this transformation are our Co-founders Dr. Reena and Dr. Gaurav Sharma. They bring unparalleled expertise and a shared passion for health, sustainability, and impactful solutions.

Let us work together towards a world, where good nutrition is available to all and secure food safety to feed the future population.

Description: Africa is the world's second-largest and second-most populous continent, after Asia in both cases. Name: Urban Tiller
Description:
Urban TIller is WORLD's FIRST and ONLY Leafstock agnostic leaf protein company. Our mission to accelerate adoption of plant based foods by supplying novel ingredient Rubisco, the most abundant and most sustainable plant protein in the world. We are a B2B novel ingredient company supplying leaf protein and fibre extracted from a variety of leaves. 

We have developed a proprietary process to extract Rubisco (Ribulose-1,5-bisphosphate carboxylase-oxygenas), the world’s most abundant and high-quality leaf protein from a wide variety of green leaves. RuBisCo also displays promising techno-functional properties, such as a high foam volume and stability and a heat-induced gelation at low protein content. This makes Rubisco an ideal candidate not just as a key protein source but also a great additive to vegan and alternate protein products.

Name: Willing Hearts
Description:
A secular, non-affiliated charity, Willing Hearts is wholly run by volunteers, apart from a handful of staff. It operates a soup kitchen that prepares, cooks and distributes about 6,500 daily meals to over 40 locations island wide, 365 days a year. Beneficiaries include the elderly, the disabled, low income families, children from single parent families or otherwise poverty stricken families, and migrant workers in Singapore.

Willing Hearts is a registered as a society with the Ministry of Home Affairs since February 2005 and as a charity with the Ministry of Ministry of Social and Family Development since December 2008.

Vision
Improving the lives of the underprivileged and marginalized by providing them with their “daily bread” and to help them become useful members of our society.

Mission
To provide daily meals and other support services to the underprivileged, the needy, and other marginalized members in Singapore, and to assist and guide them towards rehabilitating and reinstating themselves as useful members of our society.

Name: Supercraft3D
Description:
Supercraft3D is an Additive Manufacturer service bureau with focus on Healthcare and Medical applications. 

Our offerings:

Medical Models: We offer comprehensive patient specific visualization solutions that help hospitals, doctors and the academicians get a unique perspective about the anatomy. Using sophisticated hardware and software, we are able to convert traditional X-Ray, MRI, CT and other diagnostic images into clear transparent 3D Models, at a fraction of the cost and in most cases within 24 Hrs. These models are highly accurate and help the doctor to plan a better surgery, as well as the patient to understand his anatomy before undergoing any hospitalization. These models can also act as evidence in any medico-legal situation. 

Implants: Supercraft3D is also the first company in Asia to be able to offer Additive Manufactured customized body implants made of bio-compatible Titanium alloy. Currently, we are able to offer implants for patients with special needs of the physician’s practice or specific to the patient’s unique physiological/pathology needs. We are also working towards FDA and CE approval for all other implants. 

Surgical Instruments: Along with customized Medical Models and Implants, we understand the unique need for customized surgical instruments and guides for special surgeries. We offer doctor or patient specific instruments and guides that can be manufactured for single or repeatable use in different bio-compatible materials.

Name: Web Biotechnology Pte Ltd
Description:
WEB offers the Spyder ECG platform, the worlds first direct patient to database ECG system that transcends huge distances, improving patient accessibility, data connectivity and physician reactivity for Cardiac Rhythm Management. 

The system is exponentially scalable with mainly a digital footprint, and clinically proven as an extended Holter ( up to 30 days continuously ) for diagnosis of infrequent, often asymptomatic but sometimes dangerous cardiac arrhythmias such as Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation, which increases the risk of stroke. 

The system can also be used for post discharge cardiac rhythm monitoring in high risk individuals including those post heart attacks, post cardiac surgery or post stroke individuals in the fully remote setting. The system has also been used for home based cardiac rehab and physiotherapy rhythm monitoring in at risk individuals.

The data fluid system allows health care individuals to view immediately any streamed ECG data from a web-based interface on a tablet PC. Doctor Spyder also allows health care providers to generate a full report on the fly without the need of monitored individuals to physically return the Spyder device. 

The system is Medically CE marked and regulated and approved by HSA ( Health Sciences Authority ) of Singapore for remote ECG and Holter Monitoring indications.

Spyder ECG database currently has greater than 11,000 individual sessions with a mean continuous average monitoring period of 4 days. 

The quality and quantity of Individual Data, and Population Data, make the Spyder ECG platform fully AI-Ready to be used for individual and population analysis for  prediction of high risk arrhythmias in the near future. 

WEB is proud that the Spyder ECG improves #Patientaccessibility #Dataconnectivity and #Physicianreactivity.

Name: Uray - IoT urinalysis solution
Description:
Uray is a game-changing urinalysis platform that uses photonics and AI technologies to replace dry chemistry & flow cytometry providing comprehensive urine test results within 10 seconds with laboratory accuracy.

Our solution helps people to prevent chronic kidney disease (CKD), urolithiasis disease, urinary tract infection (UTI), abnormal pregnancy and many more. 
Uray is able to track 20 biomarkers with laboratory accuracy detecting multiple health conditions from a single urine sample. 

Uray system consists of device and mobile application which are synchronized via Wi-Fi allowing to receive and collect test results remotely.

=====
Uray solution at-a-Glance:
· handheld device for urinalysis PoCT & home-based
· no more than 10 seconds for the test
· laboratory accuracy with photonics & AI technologies
· comprehensive diagnostics according to 20 biomarkers
· smartphone is not required due to an IoT solution
· completely non-invasive and reagent-free
· disposable urine containers are utilized
· no contact with body fluids, easy to clean
· longitudinal monitoring of health dynamics 

=====
About:
Uray is a MedTech Startup with a team of experts in photonics, machine learning, hardware development, medical devices marketing and sales.
We have completed the proof of concept stage and almost finished the MVP, assembled a small batch of devices for testing in clinics.

Name: Silicon Cloud International Pte Ltd
Description:
Secure Cloud Computing for Semiconductor Design and Collaboration

Silicon Cloud International (SCI) is a privately held company registered in Singapore. Our mission is to provide secure and private cloud-based semiconductor design infrastructure and eco-system. Our initial focus is to provide turn-key IC design flows and a secure, multi-tenant, cloud-based, scalable computing environment for universities and research institutions around the world.

Security has long been a major obstacle for the deployment and adoption of IC design in the cloud. Our underlying cloud architecture and technology has been successfully demonstrated as part of a US government-funded prototype with defense-grade security. A secure and trusted environment will enable universities and research institutions access leading edge manufacturing technologies (PDK), state of the art design tools and the latest open source and proprietary cloud computing technologies.

SCI has established a strategic partnership with the Semiconductor Research Corporation (SRC) to structure joint advanced research collaboration between universities and the SRC semiconductor industry consortium members. To date, semiconductor design, methodology, and IP research between multiple international research universities and industry under a cloud computing security model has not been possible.

SCI will provide a secure semiconductor design infrastructure computing cloud and ecosystem that will be maintenance free and provisioned with the latest semiconductor process technologies, production grade reference work flows, semiconductor IP, and Electronic Design Automation (EDA) software.

We are in varying levels of engagement with several countries around the world to establish a national semiconductor design and computing infrastructure.

Description:
Assaya is a medical technology company that is revolutionizing the way rapid diagnostics are conducted and interpreted. The company's flagship products, the iaX Universal Rapid Diagnostic Reader and LEIQA RDTs, offer a number of advantages over traditional rapid diagnostic tests, including:

Universal compatibility: The iaX can reaprioritizing real-time reporting and accessibility, Assaya is redefining the way healthcare professionals and individuals access critical health information.

The company's mission revolves around the development and implementation of RAPID (Reliable, Augmented, Practical, and Inexpensive Diagnostics) technology. This state-of-the-art diagnostic tool is designed to be adaptable and versatile, enabling its deployment in a wide array of settings, from well-equipped urban medical centers to underserved rural areas. This accessibility ensures that vital diagnostic services reach people who need them the most, regardless of their location or socioeconomic status.

RAPID diagnostics' ability to rapidly identify biomarkers and dangerous pathogens is a game-changer in healthcare. Quick detection and reporting enable healthcare professionals and individuals to make informed decisions about treatment and prevention strategies, ultimately reducing the spread of disease and improving overall public health.

Assaya's dedication to sustainability and ethical responsibility is evident in their efforts to minimize the environmental footprint of their diagnostic solutions. They actively work to ensure that their technologies and practices align with sustainable principles and that their products are accessible to all, regardless of income or location. This commitment to inclusivity helps bridge the gap between illness and wellness, empowering people worldwide to take charge of their health and well-being.

Moreover, Assaya actively collaborates with governments, NGOs, and other organizations to promote the widespread adoption of their diagnostic solutions.

Name: ICP | Innovators Commercialisation Program
Description:
The ICP -  Innovators Commercialisation Program is led by Asia Research & Innovation Alliance (ARIA)'s Institute of Healthtech Excellence, in collaboration with the National University Hospital of Singapore (NUHS) - Centre for Innovation in Healthcare (CIH). ICP program helps innovators to accelerate their product validation and expansion into Singapore.

A global team of healthcare professionals and clinicians will offer clinical validation and venture building support to grow your business in Singapore and the region over a 6 months program. Completion of the ICP program will allow innovators access to venture investment of up to USD1,000,000.

BENEFITS OF THE PROGRAM
- Venture Funding of $1million Dollars
- Establish Global HQ in Singapore with Regulatory Incentives
- Fast Track to Clinical Adoption and Trials in Singapore and across Asia
- Network with the largest Medtech companies in the world
- Access to a Global Committee of Medical Industry Professionals 

PROGRAM THEMES
1. Improving Users Lifespans and Quality of Life
2. Enabling Seamless Delivery of High-Quality Healthcare
3. Digitalisation of Hospital Systems
4. Enhancing Women's and Children's Health Outcomes

PROGRAM STRUCTURE
The program is split into 3 phases of 6 months in total: 
1. Phase 1 covers the Clinical Validation phase with the NUHS-CIH team, with access to 3 major hospitals and 8 polyclinics in Singapore.
2. Phase 2 is the product actuation process with the venture building team comprising of top medical industry professionals.
3. Phase 3 is the venture funding and scale-up process, with key support provided in operational roles

SELECTION CRITERIA
1. Prototypes have been developed
2. Patents approved or pending approval
3. Obtained preliminary clinical trial data and/or published in research publications
4. Business plans developed 

HOW DO YOU APPLY?
Send your 1 slide business plan to connect@ariainstitute.org OR apply through the website https://www.ariainstitute.org/icp

Description:
Nasotrak is developing a nasogastric tube (NGT) system which uses ultrasound technology to help the user to determine the location of the distal end of the NGT to give a real-time, accurate and safe means of tube's position before feeding.

Commonly used methods for detecting correct NGT placement are pH aspirates and X-rays. However, these methods are not foolproof: pH aspirates cannot be immediately drawn in more than 50% of patients and misinterpretation of X-rays were responsible for 45% of misplacements.

In 2017, 40 million NG tubes were used annually for an estimated total market of $385 million. The global NGT market is expected to have a CAGR of 6%, reaching ~$546 million in 2022.

THOUGHTFUL PLANT-MEAT DRY MIXES: CHICKEN, BEEF, PROTEIN & PRAWN

Ranking high for protein quality backed by PDCAAS reports, THOUGHTFUL is “25% lower in saturated fat & sodium compared to regular plant-based meat alternatives” offered in the current market (HPB Singapore). With all necessary essential fatty & amino acids the body needs to grow, stay strong & healthy, THOUGHTFUL is an ideal product to provide the perfect protein!

Long shelf life is guaranteed, promising zero food waste. No refrigeration or freezing needed for transportation also means unbeatable end-to-end cost efficiency for chefs, caterers & end-users while ensuring lower carbon emission. 

Once reconstituted, THOUGHTFUL has a texture just like ground meat which can be used as a meat substitute in soups, stews, sauces, burgers, stir-fries, gyozas, meatballs, etc. With no added artificial seasonings or additives, THOUGHTFUL can be spiced & seasoned to suit all dietary requirements, all cuisines.

Name: LOCABA Bakery Singapore
Description:
It all started in Europe: In 2012 Austrian-born Markus Berndt was diagnosed with diabetes Type 2. The former manager changed his entire lifestyle and embarked on a long quest of research, expert discussions and self-experiments. And it paid off: Today Markus is considered as “cured” (without ever having taken insulin), is a bestselling author and with his lectures and seminars he has led hundreds of interested Type 2 diabetics out of their lifestyle dead end.
His mission included – against all odds – good food. Markus was convinced that it’s possible to rebuild dishes so that they taste great AND are optimized for the human metabolism. For six years Markus experimented with hundreds of ingredients and thousands of combinations, always checking their effect on his blood sugar level. Throughout this process he collected an enormous amount of data and a unique know-how. A know-how that has materialized in delicious treats that are available in Singapore since March 2019.
From Austria To Singapore
The renowned Singaporean hospitality group, Ponte Group, discovered the treasure of Markus’ recipes and know-how. In a co-operation between Markus and local chefs a portfolio of cakes and desserts has been created that all have the signature LOCABA qualities: All cakes are low-carb, (household) sugar free, diabetic-friendly and as they are totally grain free they are also free from gluten containing ingredients.
LOCABA uses cage-free eggs and strictly no artificial preservatives. The latter is the reason why there are not products in stock at the bakery. All cakes are freshly baked to order.
Customers appreciate this high-quality approach. The cakes range from 45 SGD to 135 SGD (serve up to 14 persons).
LOCABA’s low-carb cakes are also suitable for keto or paleo nutrition and they are far from being recommendable for diabetics only. As they are good for your figure and your teeth, LOCABA cakes are perfect for healthy conscious foodies and for kids!

Name: Elok Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Elok is a specialised design and manufacturing company with a focus on guarding tank terminals /  road tankers from ignition hazards of static electricity through the implementation of our Tanker Earthing Systems.
The equipment measures whether a vehicle is grounded properly to avoid risk of ignition . Correct grounding is considered as an interlock condition for loading/unloading that must be in place before the loading/unloading operation can commence.

Why is Electrostatic Grounding important? 
To prevent uncontrolled electrostatic discharges which could lead to ignition hazardous when loading and unloading flammable liquids and powder from: 
Road trucks
Rail wagons 
Containers 
Drums 
Bags C-FIBC

Apart from ensuring  road tank-car and tank wagons are earthed correctly and free from static electricity during loading and unloading for flammable liquids there are many other applications where the quality of the electrostatic grounding is important e.g. C FIB-C bags where electrostatic build up could be hazardous and basically containers that are being filled/unfilled or refilled. 

The key benefit of using Elok for your products is that we provide a complete service from developing your idea, electronically, mechanical, finding the correct enclosure solution through prototyping, testing and certification to final serial production.

All this in-house using our own highly experienced design teams and manufacturing capacity with over 25 years experience designing and manufacturing equipment for explosive atmospheres (Ex).

Elok Asia services and supports Elok's clients in Asia and the Middle East.

Name: Pro-health Water Technologies
Description:
Pro-Health is the world’s first system to produce mineralized water through an automated filtering process. A smart water monitoring and dispensing system that can turn supplies of tap water into enhanced mineral water, Pro-Health provides consumers with fresh, spring-like water. As rich and as nutrient-packed as water freshly collected for mountainous regions around the world, Pro-Health allows for the precise control of mineral levels. The system is promising to revolutionize the water industry and introduce new technologies with broad applications in Singapore and beyond.

Subjecting water to a new re-mineralization process, Pro-Health infuses everyday tap water, used for drinking or cooking, with six vital nutrients or minerals. Consumers drinking or cooking with Pro-Health water are then exposed to these healthy, rich nutrients, which help to promote physical health and mental well-being. 

The lifeblood of humanity, water has been necessary for survival for all of time. With Pro-Health, traditional water is  being revitalized with new filtration and infusion technologies. Pro-Health has been pioneered by Chew Soo Yan with the help of technical and engineering teams from the Centre of Innovation@Singapore. Completing a successful prototype in January 2020, the Centre validated Pro-Health for its ability to mechanically re-mineralize and alter its nutrient composition in an automated process. 

Support Pro-Health on Kickstarter here: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/chewsooyan/pro-health-water-system-water

Pro-Health is a product of Pro-Health Water Technologies Pte Ltd. Developed by Chew Soo Yan, with the help of technical and engineering teams from the Centre of Innovation@Singapore, Pro-Health represents the latest in water filtration and infusion technologies. The system is expected to reshape current water filtration processes and re-mineralize the water we use for drinking and cooking with every day.

Name: Alchemy Affair
Description:
Cold-pressed juices have long been celebrated as a vibrant and natural way to nourish the body, harnessing the raw power of fruits and vegetables—without the need for artificial additives or pasteurisation. Unlike traditional juicing methods that generate heat and compromise nutritional integrity, cold pressing uses a hydraulic press to extract juice gently and without oxidation. This preserves the natural enzymes, vitamins, and minerals found in fresh produce, resulting in juices that are richer in color, bolder in flavor, and superior in nutritional value. It’s a modern, clean source of energy for those seeking to fuel their bodies with intention.

Today, cold-pressed juices have moved beyond trend status—they’ve become a daily essential for health-conscious individuals, busy professionals, and anyone looking to boost their immunity, vitality, and overall wellness. Detoxifying green blends with kale, cucumber, and lemon promote hydration and cleansing. Deep red elixirs made with beetroot and citrus support heart health and circulation. And invigorating combinations like ginger, pineapple, and turmeric deliver powerful anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits. Whether enjoyed as a morning energizer, mid-day refreshment, or post-workout recovery drink, cold-pressed juices are a delicious and convenient way to care for your health.

To support the active, fast-paced lifestyle of modern Singaporeans, we created The Alchemy Affair, a contemporary cold-pressed juice brand that reimagines wellness with a wide range of products designed for every moment of urban life. Beyond our signature juices, we offer innovative products like concentrated wellness shots and frozen tea bombs, crafted to deliver functional benefits in exciting new ways.

Name: BlueFairy & Co.
Description:
Touching Hearts With Specially Curated Gifts. 

That’s what BlueFairy & Co. seeks to do, as embodied by our adorable mascot PEN PEN, a fairy in blue, who exudes unbridled positivity, love and happiness. This spirit of joie de vivre (meaning ‘joy of living’ in French) is generally used to convey the cheerful enjoyment of life in anything one is doing be it chatting, reading, eating and of course, gifting - especially if the selections are chic, delectable and mood-lifting - which you’ll find aplenty at BlueFairy & Co. To borrow a popular local phrase, our gifts are sure to “warm the cockles” of the hearts of your family, friends and colleagues, whatever the occasion is such as birthday celebrations, get-well surprises and farewell get-togethers. More importantly, as a social enterprise which is dedicated to making a difference in the lives of underprivileged children, 10% of BlueFairy & Co.’s earned revenue will go to A Packet of Milk Campaign, our maiden CSR programme for 400 needy children living in the slums of Tondo in the Philippines. So each time you send a gift from BlueFairy & Co. to family and friends, you’ll also be bringing happiness and hope to the less fortunate kids who are living in unimaginable poverty. Says founder Daniel Tan, “My maternal grand matriarch loved to help the underprivileged children and would give them some money whenever she met them. I have always been inspired by her spirit of humanity and philanthropy which I’ve now made both as the foundation and DNA of BlueFairy & Co. in honour of, and to continue her legacy.” That’s what makes BlueFairy & Co. uniquely special right from the start - providing you with a double delight experience every time you shop with us: First, the pleasure of selecting and sending wonderful novel gifts for your loved ones; second, the joy of making a positive difference to the lives of disadvantaged children.

Description:
FenMed will be providing a technology platform that aims to connect pharmaceutical companies to medical clinics in Singapore and Southeast Asia, providing companies with an additional sales channel and medical clinic more choices and price information, thereby allowing them to reduce purchasing cost. The USP of our service is that there is currently no marketplace player in the B2B space dealing in pharmaceutical drugs that aims to bring all the suppliers and doctors together. The current market is heavily reliant on sales representatives to go down to clinics and sell their products to doctors and nurses directly, with sales representatives having to wait hours before being able to meet clinics. We aim to solve these inefficiencies through our tech platform.

As the first multi-supplier marketplace specialised for the medical B2B scene, FenMed will enable doctors to focus on doing what they do best - diagnosing and treating patients. With the time and costs saved using this platform, it is our goal to ultimately lower overall healthcare costs and patients’ out of pocket expenses.

Name: CM Werkz
Description:
Condition monitoring is the process of monitoring parameters in electrical plant and equipment, such that a significant change is indicative of deterioration, wear and tear or a developing failure. We recognize that plants, buildings and facilities cannot simply be shut down at any time for inspection or maintenance work. Otherwise, it could cause disruption to the electrical installations.

The use of Condition Monitoring allows preventive maintenance to be scheduled, or other actions to be taken to avoid plant / equipment failures before they occur. Condition Monitoring helps to extend the operating lifespan of electrical plant and equipment, by giving indications of the extent of deterioration, wear and tear, and ageing.

In recognition of the above, CM Werkz Pte Ltd was set up in year 2010 to provide condition monitoring services and products to the industry.

At CM Werkz Pte Ltd, we offer Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) and Oil Quality Tests for oil-filled power transformers.  With these tests, we are able to describe how the concentrations of dissolved gases or free gases may be interpreted to diagnose the condition of oil-filled electrical plant and equipment in service and recommend future action, if any.

The oil samples collected from site are sent to an established laboratory for testing. At the laboratory, the oil samples are analyzed by professional and experienced chemists, who are aware of the behavior of transformers operating in a tropical country like Singapore.

Our value-added services include professional advice on the test results, recommendation on the frequency of testing of the oil samples, keeping record of the test results and tracking the frequency of tests.

Name: Woncho Pte Ltd
Description:
WONCHO PTE LTD is a worldwide specialist in integrated intervention services for repairing damaged capital equipment and machinery. 

In the world of fierce competition and escalating production costs, we understand the importance of getting the job done on time and within budget. The availability of our repair services eliminates the requirement for large and heavy machinery to be disassembled and removed from the vessel, platform, plant, or factory, resulting in additional cost and time for dismantling, transportation, and subsequent re-assembly and realignment of the machinery. In most situations, replacement parts might take months. When capital equipment or machinery broke down, all stakeholders would like to have it repaired back to its original condition without compromising on quality, to have a reliable, permanent, strongest possible repair, and complete in the shortest possible time. We being an integrated specialized engineering service contractor will ensure this requirement and expectation will be fulfilled.

Most importantly, our proprietary repair process will ensure capital equipment and machinery can be optimized to their maximum life span. Be it on land, voyage sailing vessel, offshore oil rigs, and platform, we operate in a wide range of industries around the World on a 24/7/365 basis for planned and unplanned shutdown repairs.

We served a variety of customers in the Marine & Offshore, Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Oleochemical, Power Plants, Steel Mills, Cement & Mining and MRO sectors. Our service team travels worldwide, operating at a remote location, in sub-zero conditions, or at sea, and is equipped with a wide range of portable tools and equipment at their disposal. We can mobilize and deploy our service team within 24-48 hours of notification. Our service team is able to work in both planned and unplanned emergency working situations, preparing work procedures and application of practical repair techniques.

Name: MV Electric (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
We are the exclusive distributor for RAEL Italian Cast-Aluminium Ex-Proof Motors in South East Asia. This range of motors are lightweight and compact, and focuses on small to mid-range motors from 0.06kw to 22kw. It covers the gas group IIA, IIB and IIC, comes in the standard temperature class of T4, with options for T5 and T6. For T4 temperature class, the maximum ambient temperature it can run without deration is 60 °C. The types of motors we offer include: Exd Flame Proof, Exde Flame Proof with increased safety terminal ‘e’, Exe Increased Safety, ExnA Non-Sparking, Two-Speeds, True Inverter Duty, TUBE motors, as well as Single Phase motors. Optional paint coatings are available.

We also carry the brand UMEB Romanian Cast-Iron Ex-Proof Motors. This range of motors are robust and rugged, and offers an extensive range from 0.09kw to 315kw. Its Flame Proof motors covers the gas group IIA, IIB and IIC. Both the Exd and ExnA range also offers IE2 high efficiency motors. UMEB also offers a range of Exd Brake Motors. Optional marine class case-to-case approval possible.

All our motors are certified to be compliant to ATEX. We offer high quality motors with a competitive price and delivery lead time of 4 – 6 weeks. We also keep ex-stocks of up to 22kw in our Singapore warehouse.

For more details, visit us at: http://mv-electric.com.sg/

Name: Sonder Social
Description:
Sonder Social is a one-stop shop and curated gifting service for all things ethical and sustainable with Asia Pacific impact. We are a social enterprise, founded on the word ‘Sonder’, which is the realisation that each random passerby is living a life as vivid and complex as one’s own. We work with a network of socially conscious brands by connecting them to the wider regional markets to reach the growing new generation of shoppers who care beyond labels. We have partnered with over 30 social enterprises from around the world to promote their impact stories and products, so as to encourage shoppers to purchase with purpose. Beyond advocating for responsible brands for people and planet, Sonder Social only uses packaging materials that are recyclable, reusable, and rescued.

The Sonder Social Gift Box
We curate gift collections of ethical products, where each collection comes with 3 to 6 items build around a theme, such as ‘Compassion’ and ‘Gratitude’. Every item rallies for a different cause around Asia Pacific, and are packed atop recycled materials in a bio-degradable packaging.

The Event Gifting Movement
Imagine the impact events could create just by providing responsible door gifts for their attendees - saving trees, increasing employment, or promoting inclusion. Embedding CSR in annual corporate and personal events allows companies to support causes that are close to their core missions and hearts. We create opportunities for companies and individuals to provide meaningful gifts that drive social impact in the easiest way possible.

The Ethical Retail Experience
We provide a platform for purposeful brands with Asia Pacific impact to showcase their products and causes for sale. Our e-commerce retail makes purchasing impact products convenient. With due diligence checks performed by our team, consumers no longer need to research on the social responsibility of individual brands.

Description:
Line8. The new way to plug-in

Power outlets that move together with your appliances; removing cable clutter. Power outlets that can be added and removed; eliminating the need for ugly multi-plug extensions. 

Ultra Smooth Engagement and Sliding Mechanism. Patented Electro-Mechanical Safety Technology. Fully Custom-built to Order in Singapore. Wood, Marble and Metallic Finishes Available.

The newest in technological advancement in Power Rails for homes, offices and professional facilities. Embodied in a simple elegant design which boasts numerous unique features. I present to you Line8.

Derived from its core function the Line8 is a linear power rail where an “infinite ∞” number of power outlets can be plugged into the power rail with a simple twist; symbolically represented by the number 8.

Together with over 10 years of experience in the power rail business, I believe and embrace that this is the concept for the future. The Line8 Power Rail System is a truly great product which is defined by its integration of its form and function.

By utilising the latest in manufacturing and finishing technologies. Using the best and most durable materials. Coupled with a truly modular design we have created a product which is easy-to-use, energy efficient, durable and most importantly, safe.

Integrated within are the latest in Smart-Home, IoT, Green Renewable Energy, Smart Grid Technologies. Incorporating multimedia points like HDMI, Cat6 Data, Telephone to name a few will ensure seamless integration. Plugging in to both power, data and technology can never be easier.

The patented design is made from premium aircraft grade hairline-black aluminium, with optional 3M DI-NOC vinyl, special finishes like Italian Bianco marble and satin/polished precious woods will add that extra finesse to any interior design.

Name: hybridcar
Description:
Hybrid Vehicle Specialist

If you’ve noticed your hybrid isn’t getting as high a number of km per liter as your used to, or simply lacking of performance , it is likely due to your Hybrid battery pack.

Hybrid batteries pack are expensive, it can cost up to thousands of dollars for each replacement
At Hybrid Car, a full service diagnostic, repair, and maintenance shop for Hybrid Electric Vehicles. We knew there had to be a better way!  We have obtained an exclusive technology which is revolutionizing the industry and allowing for more cost effective and eco-friendly alternatives to counter the effects of aging batteries pack.

The capacity of most NiMH battery modules can be increased to approximately 92-95% of a new battery module by cycling.  If any of the battery modules fail to provide proper Power or Energy, a simple replacement of the individual non-performing battery modules can be accomplished to increase the performance of the battery pack.  Most battery pack performance problems will not cause the Malfunction Indicator Lamp (MIL) to illuminate to inform the operator that there is a problem.  Typically, the MIL will only be triggered when there are more catastrophic (chronic) problems.  If most battery problems are caught before the MIL is triggered, it can usually be Conditioned back to good health.  

we know hybrids inside and out, and we’re here to help!

I have experience of a very joyful journey of collecting stones and crystals around the world and incorporating them into my meditation practice. It was not merely an ordinary journey for me but comfortable space to explore myself with a deep connection to mother nature.
My aspects of life became more communicative and expansive with me. They were enlightening, refreshing, and gave the inspiration with which one can see life in a brighter light. It sparked a creativity in me just like a star that shines brightly most in the sky full of stars. So, I decided to come up with an idea to serve the community with my creativity, positivism, inspiration, and passion for stones and crystals. I am happy to share that I have turned my passion into a dream and a brand that will keep spreading good vibes through our products. The products of Stone and Ripples are designed to offer you a unique value proposition. They provide a sense of self-care rather than just an ordinary Instagram-able object.
I hope you're satisfied with our products as much as we have a passion for offering them to you. Happy Rippling!" – Founder of S & R

As a power tools manufacturer, our philosophy is rooted in circularity—tools that are built to last, repairable, reusable, and re-imaginable. Our approach embraces Reparative Design and Material Banking to create a sustainable legacy for future generations. 

Our vision is simple: you should never have to pay AGAIN for the materials of the product you’ve already paid for. We want to give MAKERS complete control over their TOOLS. We are grateful for your trust to WO:EX and sincerely hope to be useful.
Wonderful Training & Rehabilitation Exoplatform WO:EX helps people with disabilities improve gait and balance.
WO:EX priority is safety and correct biomechanics.

TECHNOLOGY DESCRIPTION
WO:EX is a patented training device includes movable frame with body support system and robotic module. Movable frame has adjustable arm supports and pivot 360-degree wheels. Body support system gently wraps around torso to connect to the movable frame. Robotics is a removable module comprises two (left & right) lift drivers, control unit, remote control panel and battery accumulator block. Lift drivers are fully motorized element with two (left & right) lifting blocks to feet conjunction.

USERʼs PROFILE
We designed WO:EX as an assistive and rehabilitation device to help people with gait and balance impairments improve Activities of Daily Living (ADL). Many neurological, age- associative and orthopedic disorders affect neuromuscular functions to disability. For our clients with sarcopenia, stroke, Parkinsonʼs disease, osteoarthritis and chronic low back pain syndrome, WO:EX creates unique conditions where safety and correct biomechanical training directly impact on movement deficiency.

HOW TO USE
You got your WO:EX in a box. Here you can find three separate assembly units inside. The first one is the movable frame, second includes the body support system, and the third one removable robotic module. Please read manual carefully before using WO:EX. First of all, you need to assembly the movable frame, and robotic module. Further, follow your experience with «Set Up Mode» to specify how high each leg will be lifting. In addition, you need to dress and fit body support system. When the body support system connected with the movable frame you can operate WO:EX to move and lift the legs.

Name: Tera-X
Description:
Tera-X is a cutting-edge technology company that specializes in developing innovative solutions for the plastic pipe extrusion industry. Our flagship product is an inline thickness measurement technology that uses terahertz radiation to continuously measure the thickness of pipes in real-time. This technology has the potential to not only save up to 20% of raw material consumption, but it also helps to optimize production, document the production process, and reduce waste and overuse of resin, which in turn decreases the carbon footprint and increases the bottom line for plastic manufacturers.

Our technology is not limited to a specific material, it can be used for all types of plastic pipes like PE, PVC, PP, and ABS. This means that our solution is versatile and can be applied to a wide range of applications such as water supply, drainage, sewage, and gas distribution.

At Tera-X, we are committed to sustainability and the reduction of waste in the plastic pipe extrusion industry. Our technology is designed to help manufacturers optimize their processes, reduce their environmental impact, and improve their profitability by increasing revenue. We are excited to share our progress and can't wait to see the impact that our technology will have on the industry.

Our goal is to bring this technology to the market as soon as possible and revolutionize the plastic pipe extrusion industry with our cutting-edge solution. For more information about Tera-X, please visit our website or contact us for more information.

Name: Astaara Technology
Description:
Astaara Technology is a Singapore Company specialized in the manufacturing of Leak Detection Instruments specially developed to detect leaks in flexible packaging for the Food, Pet Care & Cosmetic Industries.
 
We are using the only method suitable for this application, “Flow Measurement at a Constant Pressure”, as instruments using pressure drop do not work on products whose volume changes during the test.

In addition to extremely accurate and reliable micro-leak detection (from 5 microns), Astaara products offer unique advantages:  

1/ Altitude simulation: we have developed a test to measure the effects of altitude on flexible packaging.  With the AlphaLab, test the resistance of your packaging up to 20,000 feet, discover at which altitude it starts leaking. This simulation is exclusive to Astaara.

2/ Accurate measurements: when leak tests are currently performed on products where there is little space inside the package between the product and the film (headspace), the hollow needle used by our competitors gets regularly stuck in the product and clogs very frequently, and the results are not reliable. Astaara has developed and patented a unique perforation method that prevents this blockage: the AlphaTower.

3/ Cost savings: because we accurately measure the pressure at which packaging starts to leak, manufacturers can choose the most suitable packaging material for their product, and make substantial savings by selecting a film that is not too thick and therefore too expensive.

4/ Automation: the AlphaPro manufactured by Astaara is today the one and only way to AUTOMATICALLY perform sample leak detection on flexible packaging without any human intervention. Food, Pet Care & Cosmetic Manufacturers are now able to automatically manage leak detection and analyze immediate digital tests results with the AlphaPro.

Our products are thoughtfully designed and developed with circularity in mind. By focusing on reducing carbon emissions and maintaining a strong environmental ethos, Edibites aims to create a positive impact on our planet while providing sustainable and innovative tableware solutions.

Description:

We've got you covered as your Quasi-Regional APAC HQ.

Navigating this complex market requires a deep understanding of local regulations, market dynamics, cultural nuances and customer preferences. Our team at Celosia has decades of experience working with leading multinational medical device companies and understands the intricacies of entering and succeeding in this region. Growing businesses, no matter if start-ups or mid-szed, is our passion!

Partner with Celosia to strategically expand your footprint in the Asia-Pacific market and optimize your distributor sales performance. We’ll help you unlock new growth opportunities, build strong regional partnerships, and achieve your business objectives in one of the world’s most promising but likewise challenging healthcare markets.
